Package se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn

package se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn
BankID authentication classes.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp
    The BankID SAML IdP.
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn.annotations
    Annotations for BankID components
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn.api
    BankID IdP backend API.
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn.context
    BankID context.
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn.error
    BankID error handling.
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn.events
    Event handling.
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn.service
    BankID service support, i.e., communication with the BankID server.
    se.swedenconnect.bankid.idp.authn.session
    BankID session handling.
  • Class
    Description
    BankIdAttributeProducer
    An AttributeProducer that makes sure that the authContextParam and transactionId attributes are released even if they are not explicitly requested.
    BankIdAuthenticationController
    The controller to which the Spring Security SAML IdP flow directs the user to initiate BankID authentication/signature.
    BankIdAuthenticationProvider
    The BankID AuthenticationProvider.
    BankIdAuthenticationToken
    An Authentication object representing a successful BankID operation.
    BankIdUserData
    Meta container for session data.
    DisplayText
    Class that represents text to be displayed for the user (during authenticate or sign).
    DisplayText.TextFormat
    Format of the display text.
    ForwardRouter
    The ForwardRouter class is responsible for configuring routing frontend routes to the Vue 3 router served by index.html.
    IndexRouteConfiguration
    Controller for templating index.html for setting base path.
    UserVisibleDataFactory
    A utility class that builds the correct messages to display for the user during signing and authentication.
